goodreads.description: 9 primary works • 9 total works

books.title: Return of the Runebound Professor
books.description: Lives are a currency, and Noah Vines is rich. After standing around in the afterlife for thousands of years, Noah steals a second chance at life and is reborn into the body of a dying magic school professor.

books.title: Return of the Runebound Professor 2
books.description: Father may have been prepared to meet a demon, but Noah has grown far stronger than anyone anticipated.

books.title: Return of the Runebound Professor 3
books.description: The Survival Exam is over and Noah's group have moved deeper into the academy.

books.title: Return of the Runebound Professor 4
books.description: The Head of the Linwick Family has sent assassins after Noah.

books.title: Return of the Runebound Professor 5
books.description: Noah and his allies continue to grow stronger, but the threats against them escalate.

books.title: Return of the Runebound Professor 6
books.description: The Demon Realm isn't ready for Spider.

books.title: Return of the Runebound Professor 7
books.description: Wizen is out of places to run. Noah carved his way through enemies to confront him.

books.title: Return of the Runebound Professor 8
books.description: Wizen is dead. Noah chased him through the Damned Plains.

books.title: Return of the Runebound Professor 9: A Progression Fantasy Epic
books.description: Book 9 of the next hit Progression Fantasy series.

Together with his long-suffering human minion Victor, Vainqueur embarks on hilarious quests for gold, experience points, and ever more outrageous class upgrades.

goodreads.description: An epic fantasy series by David Estes set in a world where magical birthmarks — Fatemarks — grant supernatural abilities. Following multiple POV characters across warring kingdoms, the series weaves political intrigue, large-scale battles, and prophesied saviors into a sweeping narrative about fate, free will, and the cost of power.

books.description: The truth is coming, and it won't be kind.

goodreads.description: A system-apocalypse LitRPG by JF Brink following Zac, a young man who must survive when Earth is integrated into a multiversal System. Armed with a cosmic axe and sheer determination, Zac delves into dangerous zones, fights invading aliens and monsters, and grows powerful enough to protect what remains of humanity.

goodreads.description: A comedic LitRPG series by Ryan Rimmel following Jim, a regular guy transported to a fantasy world where he becomes the unlikely mayor of a rundown village. Balancing town management with adventurer duties, Jim leads a party of misfits through hilarious misadventures while building Noobtown into a thriving community.

goodreads.description: A xianxia progression fantasy by KrazeKode that blends cultivation with scientific principles. The protagonist discovers that qi energy follows laws analogous to physics, using analytical thinking and experimentation to revolutionize cultivation techniques in a world of ancient sects and mystical martial arts.

goodreads.description: An epic fantasy series by Robin Hobb spanning five sub-trilogies set in the Realm of the Elderlings. Following the royal assassin FitzChivalry Farseer across decades, the series explores themes of duty, sacrifice, and the bond between humans and dragons. Widely regarded as one of the greatest fantasy sagas ever written.

books.title: Assassin's Apprentice
books.description: Fantasy as it ought to be written. Young FitzChivalry Farseer is the bastard son of a noble, trained as an assassin.

books.description: Fitz has survived his first hazardous mission as king's man, but the danger is far from over.

books.title: Assassin's Quest

books.title: Assassin's Fate

goodreads.description: An epic military fantasy by Evan Winter set in an African-inspired world where the physically superior Omehi rule over the lesser caste. Following Tau, a young man seeking revenge after his father's murder, the series features intense sword combat, dragon-riding elites, and a protagonist who must overcome impossible odds through sheer willpower.

books.title: The Rage of Dragons
books.description: The Omehi people have been fighting an unwinnable war for generations.

books.description: Desperate to delay an impending attack by the indigenous people of South Africa.

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a Fuck
author: Mark Manson

goodreads.description: A self-help book by Mark Manson that challenges conventional positivity culture. Manson argues that life's struggles give it meaning, and that choosing what to care about — rather than trying to feel good about everything — is the key to a good life. Blunt, humorous, and grounded in philosophical principles.

books.title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
books.description: A superstar blogger cuts through the crap to show how to stop trying to be positive all the time so we can truly become better, happier people.

goodreads.description: Self-help author Mel Robbins presents a simple but powerful mindset shift: instead of trying to control other people's actions and opinions, 'let them' do what they're going to do. This frees you to focus on your own choices, boundaries, and happiness. The book provides practical strategies for reducing anxiety and reclaiming personal power.

books.title: The Let Them Theory
books.description: What if the key to happiness, success, and love was as simple as two words? Let Them will set you free from the opinions, drama, and judgments of others.

goodreads.description: A dark fantasy LitRPG series by Hugo Huesca following Edward, who becomes a Dungeon Lord — a being of darkness tasked with building and managing a dungeon. Balancing his humanity with his new dark powers, Edward must defend his dungeon from adventurers and rival dungeon lords while protecting the people under his care.
A LitRPG series by Nic G. D. Orr.

books.description: A LitRPG series following a protagonist in a world where magical bonds determine power.
